description: Adversarial domain‑adaptation classifier for tabular data that learns domain‑invariant representations via a Gradient‑Reversal Layer. Handles numeric and categorical features, provides scikit‑learn‑compatible fit/predict methods, and includes a simple wrapper entrypoint.
known_pitfalls: CUDA/MPS use requires a matching accelerator-enabled PyTorch build; unavailable backends fall back to CPU.
Domain adaptation is useful only when auxiliary rows represent a meaningful shifted domain; otherwise a simpler tabular model may be stronger.
The lexicographically second binary target class is treated as the positive probability.
Training obeys the harness AIBUILDAI_MAX_EPOCHS and AIBUILDAI_EARLY_STOPPING_PATIENCE ceilings.
